nasb.text: This city will not be a pot for you, nor will you be flesh in the midst of it, but I will judge you to the border of Israel.

esv.text: This city shall not be your cauldron, nor shall you be the meat in the midst of it. I will judge you at the border of Israel,

cnv.text: 這城必不作你們的鍋，你們也必不作其中的肉。我必審判你們直到以色列的邊境；

ccb.text: 这城必不是你们的锅，你们也必不是其中的肉，我必在全以色列施行审判。
